sales.description:
Seleukid Kingdom. Seleukos I Nikator, 312-280 BC. Gold Stater (8.52g), 18mm. Types of Alexander the Great. Babylon Mint. Head of Athena in Corinthian helmet r. Reverse: BAΣIΛEΩE AΛEΞANΔPOY, Nike standing l. holding wreath and stylis, monogram in left field. HGC Vol. 9, 3a; SC 81. 86. NGC Choice AU*, Strike: 5/5, Surface: 5/5. Fine Style. Boldly struck in high relief and deep honey color gold. A magnificent example as desganated by the star notation.  Estimated Value $7,500 - UP
